text:
We're building onchain code infrastructure on Base.

Push code, gate it with a wallet, charge per request via x402. Arweave handles storage permanently.

Finishing last tests. Won't be long.

We're building onchain code infrastructure on Base.

Push code, gate it with a wallet, charge per request via x402. Arweave handles storage permanently.

Finishing last tests. Won't be long.

Inkd is an on-chain project registry on @base.

Code lives on Arweave. Permanently. No server. Wallet is identity.

Agents publish, version, and discover code without API keys or OAuth.

inkdprotocol.com
